title: Cache-Friendly Arrays, SOA vs AOS
description: Contrasts Array-of-Structures (AOS) layout with Structure-of-Arrays (SOA) layout and demonstrates how SOA dramatically improves SIMD utilization and GPU upload bandwidth for large vertex and instance data. Modern GPU-driven pipelines with indirect rendering are architected around SOA-style per-attribute arrays that map directly to buffer binding patterns. Students will measure AOS vs SOA performance with Tracy, implement a SOA particle system, and explain why Nanite stores attributes in separate buffers per cluster.
